name: @lattice-code/cli
description: Terminal CLI for Lattice Code coding agents.

scripts.build:deps: pnpm --filter @lattice-code/shared-types build && pnpm --filter @lattice-code/storage-core build && pnpm --filter @lattice-code/sdk-core build && pnpm --filter @lattice-code/sdk-runtime build && pnpm --filter @lattice-code/harness build
